description_text: WELCOME TO MY STORE STORE HOME ABOUT US ADD TO FAVORITES NEW ARRIVALS ENDING SOON CONTACT US 4X BUMPER FIN CANARD SPLITTER DIFFUSER VALENCE SPOILER LIP FOR MITSUBISHI LANCER DESCRIPTION This listing is for 4 pieces of carbon fiber pattern front bumper canards splitters Specially For Mitsubishi Lancer 2000-2020 2021. This canards splitters made by paintable flexible Polyurethane, with special sharp looking design. It's durable and lasting a long time under any weather situation. It will give your auto a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look by adding this front bumper canard. You deserve it!!!!! Item Details 4 pieces of carbon fiber pattern front bumper canards splitters 2 small and 2 big size canards with installation hardwares Color: Carbon Fiber Pattern Material: paintable Polyurethane Length: 2 pieces 10", 2 pieces 12" It can give your car a very sporty looking in minutes It is durable and long lasting during any weather situation It can also protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damges Note Product will require drilling holes into the bumper and/or lip/diffuser to attach safely to the vehicleProfessional installation Is highly recommended PAYMENT SHIPPING RETURN FEEDBACK ABOUT US 1. We accept payment via PAYPAL only. 2. eCHECK from PayPal will only be processed once the payment clears. 3. Payment must be made within 4 days of auction closing. 4. Total amount due includes the final auction price plus Shipping & Handling. 5. Shipping & Handling will be determined based upon the SHIP TO address.
